title: Cuneiform Tablet #0725: Neo-Assyrian Mathematical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a mathematical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a mathematical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Assyrian period. Mathematical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records mathematical matters typical of Neo-Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
